description_long: This is a modern electronic keyboard synthesizer, featuring a full set of white and black keys arranged in a standard piano layout. The top panel is equipped with numerous control knobs, sliders, and buttons, likely for sound modulation and effects, as well as a digital display for settings and presets. The casing is primarily black with some colored accents around the controls, and the keys are made of white and black plastic. The rear and side panels appear to have various input/output ports for audio and power connections. The overall build is slim and rectangular, designed for portability and ease of use in live or studio settings. The surface finish is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of professional music equipment.
description: A sleek, black electronic keyboard synthesizer with a full set of piano keys and an array of control knobs and buttons on the top panel. It features a modern, professional design with colored accents and a digital display.
description_view_0: The keyboard is seen from a low front-left angle, highlighting the full set of keys and the main control panel with knobs and buttons.
description_view_1: Viewed from the front-right, the keys and control surface are visible, with more emphasis on the right side controls and display.
description_view_2: The rear-left view shows the back panel, where input/output ports and additional controls are likely located, with the keys partially visible.
description_view_3: From the rear-right, the back and side panels are prominent, showing colored accents and the edge of the control surface.
